9:30 AM. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. HAROLD AUERBACK APPEARING FOR PLTF. LLOYD CRENA APPEARING FOR DEFT. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT & TERMS OF STIPULATION WERE READ INTO THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLTF FOR $7,500. TO BE PAID IN MONTHLY INSTALL OF $500. ON OR BE- FORE 1-15-94 & THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER. DEFT TO SEND PAYMENT TO PLTF COUNSEL OFFICE. IF DEFT IS ABLE TO PAY $6500. ON OR BEFORE 7-15-94 THEN PLTF WILL ACCEPT THIS AMOUNT AS FULL PAYMENT AND FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. PLTF WILL ALLOW A 10 DAY GRACE PERIOD. IF DEFT FAILS TO MAKE ANY PAYMENT WITHIN THE GRACE PERIOD OF EACH MONTH, PLTF MAY BY EX PARTE APPLICATION(WITH 48 HRS NOTICE TO DEFT) MOVE FOR JUDGMENT FOR BALANCE OWING ON $7500. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
